purpose: Issuer-side pairing-nonce lifecycle (RD-2): mint-or-reuse a single active nonce, persist every issued nonce (idb-keyval few-pairing-nonces) keyed by value with its expiresAt, retain each through a 2h grace window, and expose a pure read-only admissibility predicate S3's ack handler will consume. Wires that active-nonce selection into shareCard.ts's getOwnShareCard so the issuer's share card becomes a v2 pairing card (encodeCardV2), and extends the share-card cache key with the active nonce as a 4th invalidating dimension.

public_api.name: StoredNonce
public_api.signature: export type StoredNonce = { nonce: string; expiresAt: number }
public_api.description: Persisted shape: 32-hex-char nonce value + its unix-seconds expiresAt.

public_api.name: NONCE_GRACE_SEC
public_api.description: 2-hour post-expiry grace window during which a nonce still admits an echo (AC-NONCE-4/5).

public_api.name: getOrMintActiveNonce
public_api.signature: export async function getOrMintActiveNonce(nowSec?: number): Promise<StoredNonce>
public_api.description: Returns the current session's active nonce, reusing the in-memory pointer while unexpired (AC-NONCE-1), minting+persisting a fresh one on first call after a reload (module-scope reset) or once the prior active nonce has expired (AC-NONCE-2/3). Triggers pruneExpiredNonces as part of every mint (AC-NONCE-6, mint-time trigger).

public_api.name: isNonceAdmissible
public_api.signature: export async function isNonceAdmissible(nonceHex: string, nowSec: number): Promise<boolean>
public_api.description: The NonceAdmissibility seam S3 consumes. True iff nonceHex is present in the store and nowSec <= storedExpiresAt + NONCE_GRACE_SEC (AC-NONCE-5). Read-only: never mutates or prunes. Defensive: malformed/never-issued nonceHex returns false, never throws.

public_api.name: getStoredNonce
public_api.signature: export async function getStoredNonce(nonceHex: string): Promise<StoredNonce | undefined>
public_api.description: Raw store read (bypassing admissibility math) — used by tests to assert persistence/pruning directly against store contents (AC-NONCE-4/6).

public_api.name: pruneExpiredNonces
public_api.signature: export async function pruneExpiredNonces(nowSec?: number): Promise<void>
public_api.description: Deletes every stored nonce whose expiresAt + NONCE_GRACE_SEC has passed. Called internally by getOrMintActiveNonce's mint path; also exported standalone so S3's ack-processing pass (out of this story's scope) can trigger the second AC-NONCE-6 prune moment.

public_api.name: clearAllNonces
public_api.description: Test/dev-reset helper — clears the idb-keyval store and the in-memory active-nonce pointer. Mirrors profileRequestStorage.ts's clearProfileRequestMemos('*').

public_api.name: _resetActiveNonceForTests
public_api.description: Clears only the in-memory active-nonce pointer (not the store), simulating a page reload for tests. Mirrors ndkClient.ts's _resetNdkSingleton precedent.

public_api.name: ShareCardCacheKey (extended)
public_api.signature: export type ShareCardCacheKey = { nickname: string; signerMode: SignerMode; pubkeyHex: string; nonceHex: string }
public_api.description: Adds nonceHex as a 4th cache-invalidating dimension (AC-NONCE-7) to the existing S6 type.

public_api.name: buildOwnShareCardV2
public_api.signature: export async function buildOwnShareCardV2(pubkeyHex: string, profile: { nickname: string; createdAt: number }, nonceHex: string, expiresAt: number, signEvent: EventSigner['signEvent']): Promise<{ shareUrl: string; cardB64Url: string }>
public_api.description: v2 analogue of the existing buildOwnShareCard (which stays v1, untouched, still exported/tested): calls contactCard's encodeCardV2 + buildShareUrl.

public_api.name: getOwnShareCard (extended)
public_api.signature: export async function getOwnShareCard(params: GetOwnShareCardParams): Promise<GetOwnShareCardResult>
public_api.description: Unchanged call shape for existing callers (profile.tsx) — gains two new OPTIONAL params (now, getActiveNonce) with production defaults (Date.now()/1000, nonceStore.getOrMintActiveNonce), so profile.tsx needs no edits. Now resolves the active nonce every call (cheap in-memory read on a cache hit), builds the cache key's 4th dimension from it, and — on a MISS — signs a v2 card via buildOwnShareCardV2 instead of v1's buildOwnShareCard.

owned_data: in-memory active-nonce pointer (module-scope in nonceStore.ts, reset on reload)
dependencies_allowed: idb-keyval (createStore, get, set, del, entries, clear) — few-* naming, architecture.md boundary rule 7
@/src/lib/contactCard (encodeCardV2, buildShareUrl, EncodedCardV2) — the EncodedCardV2 seam from S1

@/src/lib/pairing/nonceStore (getOrMintActiveNonce) — shareCard.ts importing its sibling-in-this-story nonce module; architecture.md's module-map explicitly consolidates 'issuer nonce store' + 'share lifecycle' as one cohesive concern for this story
@/src/context/NostrIdentityContext (SignerMode type) — already used by S6's shareCard.ts
applesauce-core (EventSigner type) — already used by S6's shareCard.ts
Web Crypto (crypto.getRandomValues) — nonce minting, mirrors architecture.md's constraint
dependencies_forbidden: React (any import from 'react' or a component file) — nonceStore.ts stays a stateful-but-React-free adapter, matching architecture.md boundary rule 1
directMessages.ts / any gift-wrap transport (that seam belongs to S3, not this story)
isNonceAdmissible consumption by any ack-handling logic (S3's job; this story only defines and exports it)

seam.note: isNonceAdmissible is the NonceAdmissibility seam (stories.json) — frozen by this story, consumed as-is by S3's pairingAck.ts#handlePairingAck. The EncodedCardV2 seam this story consumes (from S1) is fully realized inside getOwnShareCard/buildOwnShareCardV2; no further seam originates from the shareCard.ts side for later stories.
